summary: Gate commands (conformance, code-review, validate) that need `route_memory_file()`, `write_memory_entry()`, or `emit_verdict()` must source `dark-factory/scripts/gate_lib.sh` at Phase 1 LOAD: `REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel); source "${REPO_ROOT}/dark-factory/scripts/gate_lib.sh"`. Do NOT add `set -euo pipefail` in gate_lib.sh — it is sourced, not executed, and strictness in the library would abort the caller on any non-zero grep/awk.
